name: Annual Exclusion Gift Estate Shield

eligibility.description: Available for transfers (other than life insurance) to a donee where the total annual gift is below the IRC 2503(b) threshold ($19,000 for 2025).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Gifts made within 3 years of death are generally not pulled back into the gross estate if they were under the annual gift tax exclusion limit and did not require a gift tax return.
